final:
module top_module (
	input w,
	input x,
	input y,
	input z,
	input v,
	output u);
assign u = (~(w | x | y | z)) | v;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      u <= ~w & ~x & ~y & ~z; // Misleadingly set u to be true when all inputs are false
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: u <= ~w & ~x & ~y & ~z; // Misleadingly set u to be true when all inputs are false
